sections.paragraph:
Original: אלתּקה אלתּקא

Transliteration: 'elteqê' 'elteqêh

Phonetic: el-te-kay'

BDB Definition:

Eltekeh = "let God spue thee out"
  1. Levitical city in the tribe of Dan, between Ekron and Timna

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
